Samrat Dutta Roy

Senior Frontend Engineer at Vinsol | STADIUM

👤

I am a frontend specialist with 5+ years of experience engineering high-performance, accessible, and elegant web applications. Currently, I lead and build user-facing platforms at Vinsol | STADIUM with a focus on performance optimization, robust state management, and modern developer tooling.

Through this blog, I write deep-dives dissecting the engineering patterns, runtime architectures, and clean-code philosophies that sit just beneath the surface of frontend, backend, and systems engineering.
